sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112359" key="froni/meuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρονίμ-ευμα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112359.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prudent conduct,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.11e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
